examples: The mesophyll consists of two layers of palisade parenchyma.
Within the epidermis develops a ring of parenchyma cells, the cortex.
Secondary xylem consists of pitted vessels, parenchyma fibers and rays.
Magnetic resonance imaging and brain biopsy were consistent with fulminant demyelinating encephalomyelitis with enhancing parenchyma and leptomeninges.
